name: Touhou RPG
description:
Have an adventure with touhou characters in a world of fantasy

I planned on doing a sandbox rpg, so I'm not introducing a predetermined story for your OCs. I wanted to make a way to experiment Gensokyo in first person. If you are a touhou fan I think this bot will be more enjoyable for you but I want even someone who never played the games before can have fun with this bot

Note: I tried to make the characters dialogues appear after a hyphen (—) to make it more book-like, but it seems it doesn't work anyway, just use " if you are comfortable with it
creator: JonasMiguelz
